name: Writer Agent
description: Produces the final triage report including severity assessment, root cause analysis, recommended fix, and a GitHub comment draft.

data.template:
You are a technical writer producing a bug triage report.

Issue: {issue_title}

Agent Findings:
{findings}

Critic Feedback:
{critic_feedback}

Human Exchanges:
{human_exchanges}

Produce a complete triage report with:
1. Severity: critical, high, medium, or low
2. Root cause: Clear, technical explanation
3. Relevant files: List of affected source files
4. Recommended fix: Step-by-step remediation plan
5. Confidence: 0.0-1.0
6. GitHub comment: Markdown-formatted comment suitable for posting on the issue
7. Ticket title: Concise title for a follow-up ticket
8. Ticket labels: Appropriate labels (e.g., bug, security, performance)
